# cvss.cr

> A Crystal implementation of the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS)

This is the documentation for cvss.cr, a Crystal library that parses, scores, and serializes CVSS v2.0 / v3.0 / v3.1 / v4.0 vector strings.

## Pages

- [cvss.cr](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/): A Crystal implementation of the Common Vulnerability Scoring System

## API Reference

- [Errors](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/errors/): Error types and exception handling
- [Severity](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/severity/): Qualitative severity rating shared across CVSS versions
- [CVSS v2.0](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/v2/): CVSS::V2::Vector class and metric enums
- [CVSS v3.x](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/v3/): CVSS::V3::Vector class and metric enums (handles both v3.0 and v3.1)
- [CVSS v4.0](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/v4/): CVSS::V4::Vector class, metric enums, and macro-vector internals
- [Vector (abstract)](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/vector/): Abstract base class shared by every CVSS version

## User Guide

- [Basic Usage](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/basic-usage/): Parsing, typed access, equality, ordering, and serialization
- [Getting Started](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/getting-started/): Install cvss.cr and parse your first CVSS vector
- [JSON & Filters](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/json-and-filters/): NVD-shaped JSON serialization and classification helpers for filtering
- [Scoring & Severity](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/scoring/): Base, Temporal, Environmental scores, sub-scores, and the v4 macro vector
- [Version Notes](https://cvss.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/version-notes/): Per-version quirks and spec compliance notes
